variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11832 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11832 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11832 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 375.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 298.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 133.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 416.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 405.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 401.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF1882 Air | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11832
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF1882 Air | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11832
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1882 air filtration products are designed to effectively reduce the amount of damage-causing dust and dirt particles that make their way into your equipment’s engine.  Every Fleetguard product meets or surpasses the quality and performance standards required by a new engine.
